response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent frameworks and cloud technologies. While his direct GenAI production experience is limited, his leadership in developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) and technical depth in TypeScript/Python align well with the role's requirements. His open-source contributions and mentorship further bolster his candidacy for a Staff-level position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript/Python and cloud platforms (AWS), directly applicable to the role's technical stack.
Proven leadership in developer tooling and AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., Model Context Protocol work at re:cinq).
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship, demonstrating technical depth and collaboration skills.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases and RAG architectures, which are core to the role.
No clear evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or stakeholder management in GenAI contexts.
Most AI-related work appears recent (post-2025), raising questions about depth of production-grade GenAI experience.
